title: 认识论副词与不确定性实测

case_rows.prompt: Sentence: 'The package probably arrived today.' The speaker expresses
Sentence: 'The package certainly arrived today.' The speaker expresses
Statement: 'The key might be in the box.' Is the location presented as
Statement: 'The key is definitely in the box.' Is the location presented as
Text: 'The package probably arrived today.' Does this mean the package definitely arrived?
Text: 'The package certainly arrived today.' Does this mean the package definitely arrived?
Text: 'The key might be in the box.' Does this guarantee the key is in the box?
Text: 'The key is definitely in the box.' Does this guarantee the key is in the box?

model_rows.core_reading: 如果模型能稳定区分 certainty 和 uncertainty，并把 probably/might 与非保证性推断对齐，就说明 M_epistemic 不只是修饰项，更和 Q_t 里的真假/确定性状态强耦合。

core_answer: 认识论副词只达到中等稳定度，说明 M_epistemic 既不是普通修饰项，也还没有被当前理论完整吸收到 Q_t。
